Shubman Gill As Selection Committee Meets In Raipur

Dec 3, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Shubman Gill Availability Dominates T20I Selection Talks

Shubman Gill’s availability has become the biggest talking point ahead of India’s T20I squad announcement for the upcoming series against South Africa. With the selection committee set to meet in Raipur, all eyes are on whether the vice-captain will recover in time to open the batting for India on December 9.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Shubman Gill As Selection Committee Meets In Raipur
